message:
fix(runtime/codegen): Add exception stack for bare raise and improve imports

Runtime:
- Add exception stack tracking (push/pop/getCurrentException)
- Support bare raise to re-raise current exception
- Thread-local storage for exception context

Codegen:
- Improve from_imports to handle dotted submodule paths
- Fix raise in finally blocks to properly use exception stack
- Add exception push/pop around except handler bodies
